decisions.rationale: Valid coverage-artifact gap: files_changed lists only PathsPageHeader.tsx and the coverage JSON itself, while preflight.mapped_target_files and criteria evidence cite Paths.tsx, PathsTabBar.tsx, and pathsTabStore.ts as implement deliverables. All four target_files are evidenced in criteria_audit and functional_audit (all pass at 100%); the omission is audit traceability housekeeping only — it does not reduce coverage_pct, fail any AC, or block downstream PATHS-02..07 depends_on gates on tab state, panel visibility, or bTJDf chrome. Expand files_changed on the next implement or review pass; no source rewrite required for advance.

IR re-read (ir/refs.json style_ref edge bTJDf → Group_transparent_) confirms the bTJDf content wrapper should carry Group_transparent_. Paths.tsx mounts bTJDf with data-bubble-id and flex/gap layout but omits bubbleStyle(Group_transparent_). However Group_transparent_ resolves to background none and border-width 0 (ir/slices/styles.json) — visually neutral on this container — and PATHS-01 ACs require bTJDf data-bubble-id, header/tab bar, and sibling-panel visibility, not explicit bTJDf style_ref in acceptance criteria. criteria_audit, functional_audit, and ui_evidence for bTJDf all pass; downstream PATHS-02 and PATHS-04 depend on tab-state gating inside bTJDf, not wrapper style_ref. Defer one-line bubbleStyle addition as optional DS-01 style_ref completeness polish.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 coverage files_changed completeness for audit traceability (artifact hygiene on next pass); C-2 bTJDf Group_transparent_ style_ref polish (visually neutral, not in AC scope).
